query:
CREATE TABLE `certificates` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`userId` int NOT NULL,
	`examId` int,
	`certificateNumber` varchar(50),
	`score` decimal(5,2),
	`issuedAt` timestamp NOT NULL,
	`expiresAt` timestamp,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `certificates_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
	CONSTRAINT `certificates_certificateNumber_unique` UNIQUE(`certificateNumber`)
);
CREATE TABLE `chapters` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`chapterNumber` int NOT NULL,
	`titleEn` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`titleFr` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`descriptionEn` text,
	`descriptionFr` text,
	`contentEn` longtext,
	`contentFr` longtext,
	`order` int NOT NULL,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `chapters_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
	CONSTRAINT `chapters_chapterNumber_unique` UNIQUE(`chapterNumber`)
);
CREATE TABLE `commands` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`nameEn` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
	`nameFr` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
	`descriptionEn` text NOT NULL,
	`descriptionFr` text NOT NULL,
	`syntax` varchar(500) NOT NULL,
	`optionsEn` text,
	`optionsFr` text,
	`examplesEn` longtext,
	`examplesFr` longtext,
	`outputExample` longtext,
	`relatedCommands` json,
	`chapterId` int NOT NULL,
	`difficulty` enum('beginner','intermediate','advanced') NOT NULL,
	`order` int NOT NULL,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `commands_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
CREATE TABLE `examAttempts` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`userId` int NOT NULL,
	`examId` int NOT NULL,
	`score` decimal(5,2) NOT NULL,
	`totalQuestions` int NOT NULL,
	`correctAnswers` int NOT NULL,
	`passed` boolean NOT NULL,
	`startedAt` timestamp NOT NULL,
	`completedAt` timestamp,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `examAttempts_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
CREATE TABLE `examQuestions` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`examId` int NOT NULL,
	`questionEn` text NOT NULL,
	`questionFr` text NOT NULL,
	`optionsEn` json NOT NULL,
	`optionsFr` json NOT NULL,
	`correctAnswer` varchar(10) NOT NULL,
	`explanationEn` text,
	`explanationFr` text,
	`difficulty` enum('easy','medium','hard') NOT NULL,
	`order` int NOT NULL,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `examQuestions_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
CREATE TABLE `examResponses` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`userId` int NOT NULL,
	`examId` int NOT NULL,
	`questionId` int NOT NULL,
	`selectedAnswer` varchar(10),
	`isCorrect` boolean,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `examResponses_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
CREATE TABLE `exams` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`titleEn` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`titleFr` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`descriptionEn` text,
	`descriptionFr` text,
	`timeLimit` int NOT NULL,
	`totalQuestions` int NOT NULL,
	`passingScore` decimal(5,2) NOT NULL,
	`order` int NOT NULL,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `exams_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
CREATE TABLE `labSubmissions` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`userId` int NOT NULL,
	`labId` int NOT NULL,
	`submissionData` json,
	`isValid` boolean,
	`feedback` text,
	`submittedAt` timestamp NOT NULL,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `labSubmissions_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
CREATE TABLE `labs` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`titleEn` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`titleFr` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`descriptionEn` text,
	`descriptionFr` text,
	`difficulty` enum('easy','medium','hard') NOT NULL,
	`estimatedDuration` int,
	`objectivesEn` text,
	`objectivesFr` text,
	`prerequisitesEn` text,
	`prerequisitesFr` text,
	`instructionsEn` longtext,
	`instructionsFr` longtext,
	`validationEn` text,
	`validationFr` text,
	`solutionEn` longtext,
	`solutionFr` longtext,
	`chapterId` int,
	`order` int NOT NULL,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `labs_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
CREATE TABLE `notifications` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`userId` int NOT NULL,
	`titleEn` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`titleFr` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`contentEn` text,
	`contentFr` text,
	`type` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
	`read` boolean DEFAULT false,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `notifications_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
CREATE TABLE `troubleshootingScenarios` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`titleEn` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`titleFr` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`descriptionEn` text,
	`descriptionFr` text,
	`symptomsEn` text,
	`symptomsFr` text,
	`diagnosticsEn` longtext,
	`diagnosticsFr` longtext,
	`solutionEn` longtext,
	`solutionFr` longtext,
	`difficulty` enum('easy','medium','hard') NOT NULL,
	`relatedCommands` json,
	`order` int NOT NULL,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `troubleshootingScenarios_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
CREATE TABLE `userProgress` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`userId` int NOT NULL,
	`chapterId` int NOT NULL,
	`completedAt` timestamp,
	`progress` decimal(5,2) DEFAULT '0',
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `userProgress_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
ALTER TABLE `users` ADD `language` varchar(5) DEFAULT 'en' NOT NULL;
ALTER TABLE `users` ADD `theme` varchar(10) DEFAULT 'light' NOT NULL;
